component.name: bizcode
component.description: **BizCode** is a cross-platform desktop application for commercial management (customers, products, invoicing). It is built with Tauri 1.5 + React 18 + Express 5 + Prisma 5 + PostgreSQL, and developed to meet ISO 9001:2015, ISO/IEC 12207, and ISO/IEC 25010 quality standards.
